name: Trimble Connect Construction Collaboration API
what_it_does: Trimble Connect REST API for construction project collaboration, BIM model coordination, and document management. Enables AI agents to manage BIM model upload and version control for construction model coordination workflow, handle clash detection result retrieval and issue tracking for model coordination quality control, access project document management and file sharing for construction project documentation, retrieve todo and issue management for construction RFI and punch list workflow, manage project member and permission management for construction collaboration access control, handle 2D/3D model viewing data and measurement extraction for project information access, access revision and markup tracking for design review workflow, retrieve project activity feed and audit log for project audit trail, manage integration with Tekla Structures, Trimble SketchUp, and third-party BIM tools for design coordination, and automate model coordination reporting for construction project controls.
use_cases: Managing BIM clash detection from model coordination agents
Tracking construction issues from project quality agents
Coordinating design documents from BIM management agents
Integrating model data from construction data agents
not_for: Small projects without BIM model coordination requirements
Non-construction industries without model-based project delivery
Contractors using Autodesk BIM 360 ecosystem exclusively
best_when: A general contractor, design firm, or project owner using Trimble Connect for BIM coordination wants AI agents to automate model management, clash detection, issue tracking, and project collaboration workflow.
avoid_when: BIM DATA RISK: Trimble Connect BIM model data contains proprietary design intellectual property — ensure data access controls prevent unauthorized model download or intellectual property leakage. ISO 19650 BIM execution plan requirements govern model exchange protocols on UK/EU government projects; automated model uploads not complying with BIM execution plan create project delivery compliance issues. Trimble Connect API access requires Trimble Identity authentication; multi-tenant construction project environments require careful permission scoping to prevent cross-project data access.

auth.notes: Trimble Connect uses OAuth 2.0 via Trimble Identity. Developer portal with API documentation. Webhooks for project events. REST API with JSON. Sunnyvale, California HQ (Trimble). Public (TRMB NASDAQ). Trimble Connect is the cloud collaboration platform for Trimble's construction portfolio (Tekla, SketchUp, Viewpoint). Competes with Autodesk BIM 360, Procore, and Bentley ProjectWise for BIM collaboration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free basic plan with limited storage and projects
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per user; storage add-ons
pricing.notes: Sunnyvale, CA. Trimble (TRMB NASDAQ). Trimble Connect is cloud BIM collaboration platform. Free basic tier. Integrates with Tekla, SketchUp, and Viewpoint. Competes with Autodesk BIM 360 and Procore for construction collaboration.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: BIM IP protection — Trimble Connect model data contains proprietary architectural and engineering design IP; access scope must be tightly controlled to prevent unauthorized model access or download

ISO 19650 BIM execution plan compliance — UK/EU government projects require BIM execution plan compliance; automated model uploads must conform to naming conventions, metadata standards, and approval workflows

Multi-tenant project isolation — Trimble Connect hosts projects from multiple competing firms; verify OAuth scope limits access to authorized projects only; cross-project data leakage is a significant risk
Large model file handling — BIM models can be gigabyte-scale IFC files; automated upload/download requires chunked transfer, timeout handling, and storage cost awareness
Trimble Identity dependency — all Trimble Connect authentication routes through Trimble Identity; Trimble Identity SSO availability affects all Connect API operations

Clash detection result interpretation — automated clash issue creation from clash detection requires domain knowledge to filter false positives; raw clash detection results require engineering review before issue creation
agent_readiness.security_notes: BIM construction collaboration. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2/Trimble Identity. US/EU. BIM model and project data.

security_score_components.security_notes: BIM collaboration. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU. BIM model and design data.
